_comment: Curated AirLLM (HuggingFace safetensors) model picks shown in the LEco DevOps dashboard 'Popular models' dropdown and by `leco-cli.sh airllm popular`. Edit freely — names must be valid HuggingFace repo IDs. Sizes are approximate raw weights; AirLLM also writes per-layer shards (~equal size again).

models.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct
models.label: Qwen 2.5 · 0.5B Instruct
models.description: Tiny AirLLM smoke-test model — completes shard split in seconds.

models.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct
models.label: Qwen 2.5 · 1.5B Instruct
models.description: Small Qwen 2.5 instruct — handy for low-RAM dev work.

models.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct
models.label: Qwen 2.5 · 7B Instruct
models.description: Medium Qwen 2.5; comparable quality to Llama 3.1 8B.

models.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct
models.label: Qwen 2.5 Coder · 7B Instruct
models.description: Code-tuned Qwen 2.5 — completion, refactor, code review.

models.name: meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct
models.label: Llama 3.2 · 3B Instruct (gated)
models.description: Meta Llama 3.2 3B — requires HF_TOKEN with model access.

models.name: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
models.label: Llama 3.1 · 8B Instruct (gated)
models.description: Meta Llama 3.1 8B — requires HF_TOKEN with model access.

models.name: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B
models.label: DeepSeek R1 Distill (Qwen 7B)
models.description: Distilled DeepSeek R1 over Qwen 7B base — strong reasoning.

models.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct
models.label: Qwen 2.5 · 32B Instruct (AirLLM sweet spot)
models.description: Where layer streaming starts paying off. Plenty of disk required.

models.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct
models.label: Qwen 2.5 · 72B Instruct (very large)
models.description: AirLLM's intended use case — runs on limited RAM via layer-by-layer.

models.name: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct
models.label: Llama 3.1 · 70B Instruct (gated, very large)
models.description: Meta Llama 3.1 70B — requires HF_TOKEN with model access.
